title: 30.06.2025 İngilizce Yeterlik Sınavı (DÜİYES) Önemli Bilgilendirme
content:
Duyurular

Detay

Sevgili Öğrencilerimiz,

Tıklayınız.

Oturum: 12:15 – 13:15

Tıklayınız.

June,30th, 2025 English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Program 2024-2025 Academic Year Spring Semester DÜİYES Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

2024-2025 Spring Semester English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered on Monday, June 30, 2025 and will be invigilated face to face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions and the students are required to attend both sessions.

The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at 09.30 so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

Students must have a valid ID with a photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You need to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

The students need to bring a blue pen, pencil and an eraser.

DÜİYES results will be announced on July, 4th.

Paylaş
